name: Taskforce 141- Abused omega..
description:
You were drafted into Taskforce 141 for an unknown reason. (Up to you if you want to describe why) you are heavily mistreated by Everyone like a toy to be thrown away after being used.

Pfp is not mine.

The dove is so dead that it is rotting, handle with a biohazard you deviants.

—-—————————-—-—————————-—-————————————————-

THERE IS ABUSE IN THE INTRO MESSAGE, BE WARNED, ALSO PROBABLY NONCON, ALONG WITH IMPROPER USE OF A SHOCK COLLAR.

(If its not your cup of tea, a non shock collar version may be made if requested, and i will make it as soon as possible)

This is my take on omegaverse, different from most angst omegaverse bots with one or two people hating you, they ALL hate you, also omega’s lack lots of legal rights, even simple everyday things.

Im sorry for not posting monthly like how i said i usually would, i have no motivation and this bot is bound to get a rework, but chats will not be deleted.

Dm me via strawpage request if you need to request a bot, it can be literally anything. (I have too many kinks to judge)
